/home/user/zybo_dev/sdk/2025.2/sysroots/x86_64-petalinux-linux/usr/bin/arm-amd-linux-gnueabi/arm-amd-linux-gnueabi-g++ --sysroot=/home/user/zybo_dev/sdk/2025.2/sysroots/cortexa9t2hf-neon-amd-linux-gnueabi -mthumb -mfpu=neon -mfloat-abi=hard -mcpu=cortex-a9 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--hash-style=gnu -Wl,--as-needed  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now "CMakeFiles/zybo-streamer.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zybo-streamer.dir/v4l2_capture.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/zybo-streamer.dir/udp_sender.cpp.o" -o zybo-streamer  /home/user/zybo_dev/sdk/2025.2/sysroots/cortexa9t2hf-neon-amd-linux-gnueabi/usr/lib/libboost_system.so.1.84.0 -lpthread /home/user/zybo_dev/sdk/2025.2/sysroots/cortexa9t2hf-neon-amd-linux-gnueabi/usr/lib/libjpeg.so
